Caption: Overall workflow for optimizing dynamic charging scenarios through experiments and modeling.

Load profiles for aging tests: a) four real-world commuting scenarios, b) current profiles of four scenarios, c) fixed aging strategies (Group 1), d) dynamic aging strategies (Group 2), and the dots represent strategy switching points.

TIS-thermal-aging model and its verification. a) schematic of coupled model; b) schematic of interface of TIS model; c) OCV curves of positive and negative electrode; d) voltage, e) temperature, f) degradation of Cell A1; g) voltage, h) temperature, i) degradation of Cell D1. M = measurement, S = simulation results.

Comparison of SOH degradation and IR evolution for the two groups of tested cells. a) SOH degradation trajectories of cells in the first group; b) IR increase of cells in the first group; c) SOH degradation trajectories of cells in the second group; d) IR increase of cells in the second group. The squares indicate the scenario switching points.

Comparison of SOH, IR, and charging time among tested cells. a) and b) SOH degradation trajectories and IR comparison of Cells D1, D2 and C1; c) and d) SOH degradation trajectories and IR comparison of Cells C1, C2 and B1; e) and f) SOH degradation trajectories and IR comparison of Cells B1, B2 and A1; g) the charging time of different cell pairs until SOH intersection point; h) the capacity gain and the reduction of charging time.
